hooks.command: which protoc >/dev/null 2>&1 || (sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq protobuf-compiler) 2>&1 | tail -1; which buf >/dev/null 2>&1 || (sudo apt-get install -y -qq buf 2>/dev/null || go install github.com/bufbuild/buf/cmd/buf@latest) 2>&1 | tail -1; cd /home/user/Deneb && GOPROXY=direct make rust 2>&1 | tail -5; cd /home/user/Deneb/gateway-go && GOPROXY=direct go mod download 2>&1 | tail -1
